# Awesome Coding Agent Eval

> A curated collection of 927 resources for evaluating AI coding agents. Covers benchmarks, scoring methods, toolchain, leaderboards, and pitfalls.

This repository is organized by evaluation workflow: what to evaluate → benchmarks → scoring methods → toolchain → leaderboards → pitfalls. All data lives in data/*.json as structured JSON. Query with jq or parse programmatically.

## Benchmarks & Datasets

- [Full Benchmarks & Datasets list](docs/2-benchmarks.md): 538 resources

## Evaluation Methodology

- [Full Evaluation Methodology list](docs/3-methodology.md): 143 resources

## Evaluation Toolchain

- [Full Evaluation Toolchain list](docs/4-toolchain.md): 117 resources

## Leaderboards

- [Full Leaderboards list](docs/5-leaderboards.md): 23 resources

## Meta-Analysis & Pitfalls

- [Full Meta-Analysis & Pitfalls list](docs/6-meta-analysis.md): 106 resources

## Guides

- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): 5-minute guide to choosing and running your first evaluation
- [Evaluation Dimensions](docs/1-dimensions.md): Framework for what to measure
- [Coverage Landscape](docs/landscape.md): Visual map of benchmark coverage and gaps

## For Agents

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Structured query interface with jq commands and Python snippets
- [Data Schema](data/schema.json): JSON Schema for all entries
- [Statistics](data/stats.json): Aggregate counts and top tags

## Optional

- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add new resources
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
